message:
fix(llm): address round 3 review issues in retry and stream-timeout

- Wrap iterator.return() in try-catch to prevent cleanup errors from
  masking the real error (e.g., StreamReadTimeoutError or AbortError)
- Add signal?: AbortSignal to Request type and pass it through
  Client.stream() to withStreamReadTimeout
- Preserve status/retryable/retry_after properties when wrapping
  non-Error throws in retryLLMCall
- Export DEFAULT_STREAM_READ_TIMEOUT_MS from barrel (src/llm/index.ts)
- Add timeoutMs <= 0 validation guard in withStreamReadTimeout
- Null out timer after firing in setTimeout callback
- Refactor computeDelay to accept 0-indexed attempt parameter
- Add 402 spec deviation comment in NON_RETRYABLE_STATUSES
- Add tests: source iterator error propagation, empty iterable,
  negative/zero timeoutMs, non-Error throw property preservation,
  retry_after: 0 fallback, retry_after boundary at maxDelayMs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
